visuals.title: Machine Learning Process Flowchart
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Machine Learning Process Flowchart
visuals.svgContent:
<svg width="100%" height="600" viewBox="0 0 1000 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                <!-- Arrowhead marker for connectors -->
                <defs>
                    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
                        <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="white"/>
                    </marker>
                    <linearGradient id="processGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2c5364" />
                        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#203a43" />
                    </linearGradient>
                    <linearGradient id="appsGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#34495e" />
                        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2c3e50" />
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                
                <!-- Process Flow -->
                <g class="ml-process">
                    <text x="500" y="50" class="title">Machine Learning Process</text>
                    
                    <!-- Data Collection -->
                    <g class="pulse" style="animation-delay: 0.5s">
                        <rect x="150" y="100" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#processGradient)" />
                        <text x="230" y="145">Data Collection</text>
                        <circle cx="230" cy="165" r="5" fill="#6ede87">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Data Preparation -->
                    <g class="pulse" style="animation-delay: 1s">
                        <rect x="400" y="100" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#processGradient)" />
                        <text x="480" y="145">Data Preparation</text>
                        <circle cx="480" cy="165" r="5" fill="#6ede87">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Model Training -->
                    <g class="pulse" style="animation-delay: 1.5s">
                        <rect x="650" y="100" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#processGradient)" />
                        <text x="730" y="145">Model Training</text>
                        <circle cx="730" cy="165" r="5" fill="#6ede87">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1.5s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Evaluation -->
                    <g class="pulse" style="animation-delay: 2s">
                        <rect x="400" y="220" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#processGradient)" />
                        <text x="480" y="265">Evaluation</text>
                        <circle cx="480" cy="285" r="5" fill="#6ede87">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="2s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Deployment -->
                    <g class="pulse" style="animation-delay: 2.5s">
                        <rect x="650" y="220" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#processGradient)" />
                        <text x="730" y="265">Deployment</text>
                        <circle cx="730" cy="285" r="5" fill="#6ede87">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="2.5s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Connectors -->
                    <path d="M310 140 L390 140" class="connector">
                        <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="0, 100; 100, 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
                    </path>
                    <path d="M560 140 L640 140" class="connector">
                        <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="0, 100; 100, 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="0.5s" />
                    </path>
                    <path d="M730 180 L730 210" class="connector">
                        <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="0, 100; 100, 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1s" />
                    </path>
                    <path d="M560 260 L480 220" class="connector">
                        <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="0, 100; 100, 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1.5s" />
                    </path>
                    <path d="M480 300 L560 260" class="connector">
                        <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="0, 100; 100, 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="2s" />
                    </path>
                </g>
                
                <!-- Applications -->
                <g class="ml-apps">
                    <text x="500" y="350" class="title">Machine Learning Applications</text>
                    
                    <!-- Healthcare -->
                    <g class="float" style="animation-delay: 0s">
                        <rect x="100" y="400" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#appsGradient)" />
                        <text x="180" y="445">Healthcare</text>
                        <circle cx="180" cy="465" r="5" fill="#ff7e5f">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Finance -->
                    <g class="float" style="animation-delay: 0.5s">
                        <rect x="300" y="400" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#appsGradient)" />
                        <text x="380" y="445">Finance</text>
                        <circle cx="380" cy="465" r="5" fill="#ff7e5f">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="0.5s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Retail -->
                    <g class="float" style="animation-delay: 1s">
                        <rect x="500" y="400" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#appsGradient)" />
                        <text x="580" y="445">Retail</text>
                        <circle cx="580" cy="465" r="5" fill="#ff7e5f">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                    
                    <!-- Automotive -->
                    <g class="float" style="animation-delay: 1.5s">
                        <rect x="700" y="400" width="160" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#appsGradient)" />
                        <text x="780" y="445">Automotive</text>
                        <circle cx="780" cy="465" r="5" fill="#ff7e5f">
                            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1.5s" />
                        </circle>
                    </g>
                </g>
                
                <!-- Central AI Brain -->
                <g class="bounce">
                    <circle cx="480" cy="260" r="50" fill="#6ede87" opacity="0.2" />
                    <circle cx="480" cy="260" r="40" fill="#6ede87" opacity="0.4" />
                    <circle cx="480" cy="260" r="30" fill="#6ede87" opacity="0.6" />
                    <circle cx="480" cy="260" r="20" fill="#6ede87" opacity="0.8" />
                    <circle cx="480" cy="260" r="10" fill="#6ede87" />
                    
                    <text x="480" y="260" font-size="12" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" dy="3">AI</text>
                </g>
            </svg>
